Descriptions.Text: Make use of convenient amenities such as complimentary wireless Internet access, a fireplace in the lobby, and tour/ticket assistance.

Grab a bite to eat at one of the hotel's 2 restaurants, or stay in and take advantage of the 24-hour room service. Snacks are also available at the coffee shop/café. Buffet breakfasts are available daily from 7:30 AM to 10:00 AM for a fee.

Featured amenities include a 24-hour business center, dry cleaning/laundry services, and a 24-hour front desk. A roundtrip airport shuttle is provided for a surcharge (available 24 hours), and free self parking is available onsite.

Treat yourself to a stay in one of the 33 individually decorated guestrooms, featuring fireplaces and LED televisions. Complimentary wireless Internet access keeps you connected, and digital programming is available for your entertainment. Conveniences include safes and desks, and housekeeping is provided daily.

Distances are displayed to the nearest 0.1 mile and kilometer.

Kalkaji Mandir - 1 km / 0.6 mi
NSIC Exhibition Ground - 1.7 km / 1.1 mi
Lotus Temple - 2.2 km / 1.3 mi
ISKCON Temple - 2.5 km / 1.5 mi
Fortis Escorts Heart Institute - 2.7 km / 1.7 mi
Jamia Millia Islamia - 3.3 km / 2.1 mi
Lajpat Nagar Central Market - 4.1 km / 2.6 mi
Indraprashtha Apollo Hospital - 4.5 km / 2.8 mi
Select CITYWALK - 4.7 km / 2.9 mi
Ansal Plaza - 4.7 km / 2.9 mi
Max Super Specialty Hospital - 5.7 km / 3.6 mi
Siri Fort Auditorium - 6 km / 3.7 mi
Cardiothoracic and Neuiro Science Centre-AIIMS - 6.3 km / 3.9 mi
All India Institute of Medical Sciences - 6.3 km / 3.9 mi
Jawaharlal Nehru Stadium - 6.8 km / 4.2 mi

The preferred airport for The Orion Plaza is Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL) - 20.8 km / 12.9 mi

With a stay at The Orion Plaza in New Delhi (Kalkaji), you'll be a 3-minute drive from Lotus Temple and 10 minutes from Pragati Maidan.  This 4-star hotel is 5.5 mi (8.8 km) from Qutub Minar and 6.6 mi (10.6 km) from India Gate.

NearByAttractions.Name: All India Institute of Medical Sciences
The preferred airport for The Orion Plaza is Indira Gandhi International Airport (DEL)
